title: Musically fantastic
description: This mod gives you more options in music discs and with some cool easter eggs too!
body:
Adds 5 new music discs to minecraft. A new block. New effect Vibing. And 1 very special enchantments for your "feet". This is my first mod so.... I hope I get good luck here
**_Note that this project is still in stage ALPHA and MANY Bugs WILL occour._**
